Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state IN ('CO', 'NM') AND (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state) IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state 
HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 1)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/067056fefecbf4b762320ffe378f39e72a3a25a96bbbc37a720eae9301ec6c7f/1b44044f-196c-4302-8292-5ea30752bd66/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
